commands.review_summary:
The branch passes model tool capability into the embedded attempt tool-construction planner so `compat.supportsTools: false` short-circuits core/plugin tool prep, with focused planner coverage.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +22. Total +28 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main computes the construction plan before checking `supportsModelTools` and only drops `toolsRaw` later, so a `compat.supportsTools: false` model can still pay tool-prep cost.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the patch is focused and no actionable review finding was found; maintainers should handle normal review and landing.

target.title: fix(agents): skip tool prep when models disable tools
target.body:
## Summary
- Skip core/plugin tool construction when the active model declares `compat.supportsTools: false`.
- Keep the existing raw-model and explicit no-tools behavior, but make the documented no-tools small-model fallback avoid tool-prep overhead too.
- Add planner coverage proving forced message delivery cannot re-enable tool construction for tool-disabled models.

Refs #86599.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts --reporter=dot` (22 tests passed after rebase onto `4638f586`)
- AWS Crabbox `check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_028972a33ed4`, run `run_43eb0ce4f35f`, exit 0 on base `27cd1874`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: models configured with `compat.supportsTools: false` no longer pay to construct the OpenClaw tool surface before the runner discards it.
Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree; AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
Evidence after fix: `run_43eb0ce4f35f` completed with exit 0 on provider `aws`, lease `cbx_028972a33ed4`; a clean rebase onto `4638f586` then passed diff/format and the 22-test focused suite.
Observed result after fix: core/coreTests changed lanes passed, including typecheck, lint, guards, and import-cycle checks.
What was not tested: Blacksmith Testbox proof, because this session is not authenticated to Blacksmith; live Ollama/local-model repro, because this PR removes tool-prep overhead for the documented no-tools fallback and does not change provider transport.
target.author: vincentkoc
